title: No Rain
description: No Rain is a simple and effective Minecraft plugin that stops rain and storms on your server. Perfect for server owners who want to keep the weather sunny and clear for their players.
body:
### 📝 Project Summary
NoRain is a simple and effective Minecraft plugin that stops rain and storms on your server. Perfect for server owners who want to keep the weather sunny and clear for their players.
### 🎮 What It Does
- Stops Rain: No more annoying rain falling on your server
- Prevents Storms: Eliminates thunderstorms, lightning, and thunder sounds
- Easy Control: Use /norain enable to turn it on and /norain disable to turn it off
- Instant Effect: Weather clears immediately when you enable the plugin
- Admin Only: Only server operators can use the commands
### 🌟 Why Use It?
- Better Gaming Experience: Players won't be bothered by constant rain
- Server Performance: Reduces weather-related lag
- Easy Management: Simple commands that anyone can understand
- Reliable: Works on all popular server types (Bukkit, Spigot, Paper)
Perfect for survival servers, creative worlds, or any server where you want to maintain clear, sunny weather conditions for your players!
